title: Luiz Maurer
compiled_truth: Luiz Maurer is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-08-03 to 2001-12-03), Luiz Maurer sent 65 and received 359 emails, totalling 424 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (34), [D  Steffes](people/d-steffes) (27), [L  Nicolay](people/l-nicolay) (17), [Sergio Assad](people/sergio-assad) (12), [Jose Bestard](people/jose-bestard) (11).
